name: North Workshop
description: The northern part of the workshop. It is messy in here. You can see a power outlet and a locked door to the east.

name: Workshop Corridor
description: You are in the corridor outside the workshop. There is drill dust on the floor.

name: Corridor Junction
description: You are at a bend in the corridor.

name: Empty Classroom
description: An empty and desolate classroom. The desks are completely bare.

name: South Workshop
description: The southern part of the workshop. You can see a large cupboard here. A heavy locked door leads out.

name: Staff Room
description: The teachers' smoking room. The air is stale and heavy.

name: Corridor with Lockers
description: A corridor with a door to the west. There are several storage lockers here, one without a lock.

name: East End of Corridor
description: The eastern end of the corridor.

name: Dusty Classroom
description: A dusty classroom. The teacher's desk is half burnt.
